seoTitle: Ophir vs Oran Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ophir and Oran Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ophir vs Oran Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ophir and Oran Park.
heading: Ophir vs Oran Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ophir, New South Wales and Oran Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oran Park has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Ophir (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ophir or Oran Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ophir has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Oran Park scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ophir scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Oran Park scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ophir or Oran Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oran Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
